name: Stock Adjustment in Neto Commerce Inventory
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A stock adjustment is used to alter stock level for reasons such as write-offs, stock-takes, donations etc. You can also use it to adjust the value of a product."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This article requires the "}, {"text": "Neto Commerce Inventory", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on. If you are not using Neto inventory, please refer to the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1549-product-stock-level-quantity-management", "children": [{"text": "standard instructions"}]}, {"text": "."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Create a Stock Adjustment"}], "data-id": "create-a-stock-adjustment"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To alter your stock levels with a stock adjustment:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", 2024-09-24 at 3.46.37 pm.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the "}, {"text": "Location ", "bold": true}, {"text": "you wish Continue to do this for all the products that you would like to add to your stock adjustment"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Gn6wmMAB.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Gn6wmMAB.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2024-09-24 at 4.28.14 pm.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Cost prices will default to that products ACOG (Average Cost of Goods)."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The quantity change will default to 1 and cannot equal 0."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Stock adjustments cannot be changed once they have been saved."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Cost prices can accommodate values up to 4 decimal places."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can adjust quantity and prices on each stock adjustments lines. As you adjust the stock, the line adjustment values and total adjustment values will calculate."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "It's important to remember the following:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add a comment to the stocktake for future reference. Click the "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Gn6wrMAB.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Gn6wrMAB.jpg", Adjustment from the Product Page"}], "data-id": "create-a-stock-adjustment-from-the-product-page"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Rather than adding each product individually to a stock adjustment, they can be added in bulk from the product page:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View products", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Filter", "bold": true}, {"text": " your product selection to the products that you would like to Stock Adjustment, bulk select products and click "}, {"text": "With selected", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Create New Stock Adjustment", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "children": [{"text": "This will load the create "}, {"text": "Stock Adjustment", "bold": true}, {"text": " page with the products you have selected pre-populated."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000Gnb9vMAB.jpg", "embedData": {"url": am.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once you hit save, the "}, {"text": "Stock Adjustment", "bold": true}, {"text": " will be actioned and Stock/ACOG changes applied."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Adjust Stock in Bulk"}], "data-id": "adjust-stock-in-bulk"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock adjustments can be performed in bulk by importing a CSV file. To add the products in bulk:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Stock Control", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Add Stock Adjustment", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Populate via CSV", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to view the instructions on how to create and upload a stock adjustment file."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The maximum number of adjustments per file is limited to 250 records."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000GnbAjMAJ.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05TJ100000GnbAjMAJ.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Screen Shot 2024-09-25 at 11.20.11 am.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Download Template", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to save a blank CSV template file to your computer."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the file and populate it with your data. Save the file once complete."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click the "}, {"text": "Choose File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and browse to the file where you saved your data, and click the "}, {"text": "Open", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Populate Stock Adjustment", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to upload your file, and adjust your stock levels."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Stock levels of imported products will be adjusted as per the file you've uploaded."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Stock Transfers"}], "data-id": "stock-transfers"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please refer to our specific documentation to perform a "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1540-stock-transfers", "children": [{"text": "stock transfer"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Revalue Stock"}], "data-id": "revalue-stock"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also use stock adjustments to revalue your stock:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a new Stock Adjustment."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add your products."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "negative value", "bold": true}, {"text": " for the SOH (Stock On Hand) at ACOG (Average Cost Of Goods) to bring the quantity of the item to zero."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a"}, {"text": " positive value", "bold": true}, {"text": " for the SOH (Stock On Hand) and a new ACOG (Average Cost of Goods) to bring the quantity back to it's original value."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Repeat these steps for each warehouse."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
